name: ISO Image Mounted
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Syed Hasan (@syedhasan009)
SIGMA Title: ISO Image Mounted
SIGMA Description: Detects the mount of an ISO image on an endpoint

False positives:
- Software installation ISO files

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4663 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%security%' AND "Object Type"='File' AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '\device\cdrom%') AND (NOT(("Object Name" IN('\Device\CdRom0\autorun.ico', '\Device\CdRom0\setup.exe', '\Device\CdRom0\setup64.exe')))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY ISO Image Mounted on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4663 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%security%' AND "Object Type"='File' AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '\device\cdrom%') AND (NOT(("Object Name" IN('\Device\CdRom0\autorun.ico', '\Device\CdRom0\setup.exe', '\Device\CdRom0\setup64.exe')))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule. Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
